column1: CONFIRMATIONANDCANCELLATIONPOLICY • Block bookingsMUSTbeconfirmed at least 60days in peak season and 30 days before arrival for the rest of year. • Anon-refundable 30%deposit of the total invoice is required uponconfirmation of the booking. • 100%payment of the total Invoice is required 45 days prior to the date of arrival for all the seasons. • Cancelation 61+ days, prior to arrival - no cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 46-60 days, prior to arrival - 25%cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 22-45 days, prior to arrival - 50%cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 72 hrs - 21days, prior to arrival - 75%cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation less than 72hours, orno-show - 100%cancellation fee charged.
column2: CONTRACTTERMSANDCONDITIONS • Thisagreement is valid for the year 2025, and must be renewed annually. • These rates are confidential and cannotbemade available to any3 rd party through internet sites, e-mail, or any form ofpublishing. • Atour leader of a group pays 50%ofthecontracted rates. • Travel Agentspay 30%ofthecontracted rates, unless invited, or agreed with the Management of Tulia Amboseli SafariCamp - NOTavailable during Peak Season . • Checkinon arrival date is from12 pm(noon), • Check-out is at 10:00 am. • Should the government alter rates, thecamp reserves the right to negotiate the rates with contracted agents. • Thehotel reserves the right of admission, and the rooms are subject to availability. • Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner and walking safari are weather- permitting. • Tulia Amboseli Safari Campdoes NOT allow pets in, or on the premises.
